creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
^Triage:

- If there is a changelog or release notes URL available for this version, please add it to the URL field

- Please set the maintainer-approval attachment flag (to +) on patches for ports you maintain to signify approval

Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]

One more (nit-pick) thing:

You don't need to set the maintainer-feedback flag to [+] for this bug report. Typically, this is used to request a review from maintainers and for giving the thumbs up. For ports which you maintain it's a case of setting maintainer-approval to [+] on the attachment(s) only. Cheers!

^Lewis
